diagrams.title: Scheduling Criteria Relationship
diagrams.description: Shows how different scheduling criteria relate to each other and to the overall scheduling process
diagrams.purpose: Understanding what factors affect scheduling performance and how they interrelate

diagrams.title: Round Robin Execution Timeline
diagrams.description: Visual representation of how Round Robin schedules processes in a circular manner with fixed time quantum
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the cyclic nature of Round Robin and how preemption works at each time quantum

diagrams.title: SJF vs FCFS Comparison
diagrams.description: Comparative timeline showing how SJF and FCFS handle the same set of processes differently
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing why SJF generally provides better average waiting time than FCFS

diagrams.title: Multilevel Feedback Queue Structure
diagrams.description: Shows the hierarchy of queues in multilevel feedback queue scheduling with process movement between queues
diagrams.purpose: Understanding dynamic priority adjustment and how processes move between queues based on their CPU behavior
